info.title: SC Trade Tools API
info.description:
This API provides access to the various endpoints powering SC Trade Tools. All functionality is also available as an MCP server, to be used by local or by cloud-based LLMs.
If you want to support the project, please consider acquiring an API licence or donating on Patreon.

license.name: Help us cover our infrastructure costs by acquiring an API licence

tags.name: Tool
tags.description: Endpoints for tools such as trade route finder, itinerary planner, and buyer finder

tags.name: Item
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving information about items such as gear, equipment and components

tags.name: Crowdsource
tags.description: Endpoints for crowdsourced submissions and location bounties

tags.name: Location
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving information about locations and location types

tags.name: Commodity / Shop
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving information about commodity shops, their factions and security levels

tags.name: Commodity / Item
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving information about commodities

tags.name: Internal
tags.description: Endpoints for internal use, not intended for public consumption

tags.name: Ship
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving information about ships

post.description: Returns trade routes ranked by profit or profit-over-time based on ship, investment, and location filters. Results are filtered to only include currently profitable buy→sell pairs. Requires a valid token.

Returns an ordered sequence of trade stops between an origin and a destination, optimising total profit. Use `allowableDetour` to control how far off the direct path intermediate stops may be. Requires a valid token.

post.summary: Find sellers for a non-commodity item
post.description: Returns shops that sell a specific non-commodity item (gear, equipment, components), optionally filtered by location. Requires a valid token.
Returns a circular multi-stop trade route starting and ending at the same location, seeded by the given trade route ID. Requires a valid token.

post.summary: Find the best buyers for a commodity
post.description: Returns shops that buy a specific commodity, ordered by price. Provide the commodity quantity in SCU to get total profit estimates. Requires a valid token.

get.description: Returns the active site-wide alert message. If the `x-client-version` header is missing or below the minimum supported version, a forced-refresh notice is returned instead.
Returns the list of current Patreon supporters who have opted-in to public recognition.
Returns all ships with their cargo capacity data, sorted alphabetically. Use the ship name when submitting trade tool requests.
Returns all location security levels used to filter trade routes (e.g. Monitored, Armistice zone), sorted by lowest to highest.
Returns all locations with known trade data (planets, moons, space stations, outposts, etc.), sorted alphabetically.
Returns all meaningful location types available as filters (e.g. planet, moon, space station). System, jump-point, and unknown types are excluded.
Returns a sorted list of distinct shop-types that sell non-commodity items (e.g. Casaba Outlet, Centermass).
Returns a paginated list of all non-commodity items such as gear, equipment, and ship components. Use the `page` parameter to navigate pages (0-indexed).
Returns a single non-commodity item by its full name.
Returns all item types. Set `topLevelOnly=true` to receive only the root-level categories (e.g. Armor, Weapon, Ship component) instead of the full hierarchy.

get.summary: List sub-types of an item type
get.description: Returns the direct child item types for the given parent type, sorted alphabetically.
Returns a paginated list of items belonging to the given item type. Use the `page` parameter to navigate pages (0-indexed).
Returns a map of location names to their current point bounty multiplier for item data submissions. Locations with higher multipliers have older data.

get.summary: List alternative commodities for a trade
get.description: Returns alternative commodities for the same trade route as the given shop directed edge. Requires a valid token.
Returns all factions associated with commodity shops (e.g. Hurston Dynamics, Crusader Industries), sorted alphabetically.
Returns the crowdsource leaderboard ranked by points earned during the previous season.
Returns the crowdsource leaderboard ranked by total points earned across all past seasons.
Returns the crowdsource leaderboard ranked by points earned during the current season.
Returns the companion application version for which submissions will be accepted.

Fetches crowdsourced commodity listings submitted to the website.
  • This data is unfiltered and may contain outliers
  • This endpoint is cached server-side for 1 hour
Returns all shops that buy or sell commodities, sorted alphabetically.

get.summary: List transactions for a commodity shop
get.description: Returns all bought and sold commodities for the given shop full name, with metadata about the listings. Requires a valid token.
Returns aggregated statistics per commodity item, including average profit per SCU, average ROI, average supply/demand, and total universe-wide supply/demand. Requires a valid token.
Returns the complete list of tradeable commodity items (e.g. agricium, gold, laranite) sorted alphabetically.

get.summary: List transactions for a commodity item
get.description: Returns all shops buying or selling the given commodity item name, with metadata about the listings. Requires a valid token.
Returns the sub-types that fall under the top-level commodity item type (e.g. agricultural, metal, medical).
Returns a map of location names to their current point bounty multiplier for commodity data submissions. Locations with higher multipliers have older data.

locationNames.description: A list of location names to include or exclude, depending on locationNamesType. The list of valid location names can be retrieved from GET /api/locations.

items.description: A list of location names to include or exclude, depending on locationNamesType. The list of valid location names can be retrieved from GET /api/locations.

locationNamesType.description: Whether locationNames is used as a whitelist (only include listed locations) or blacklist (exclude listed locations).

locationTypes.description: A list of location types to include or exclude, depending on locationTypesType. The list of valid location types can be retrieved from GET /api/location-types.

items.description: A list of location types to include or exclude, depending on locationTypesType. The list of valid location types can be retrieved from GET /api/location-types.

locationTypesType.description: Whether locationTypes is used as a whitelist (only include listed location types) or blacklist (exclude listed location types).

factionNames.description: A list of faction names to include or exclude, depending on factionsNamesType. The list of valid faction names can be retrieved from GET /api/factions.

items.description: A list of faction names to include or exclude, depending on factionsNamesType. The list of valid faction names can be retrieved from GET /api/factions.

factionsNamesType.description: Whether factionNames is used as a whitelist (only include locations belonging to listed factions) or blacklist (exclude locations belonging to listed factions).

minSecurityLevel.description: The minimum security level a location must have to be considered. The list of valid security levels can be retrieved from GET /api/security-levels.

supportedBoxSizeInScu.description: The maximum box size in SCU that the ship can load, between 1 and 32. Only shop listings compatible with this box size will be included. Valid values: 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 24, 32.

avoidHiddenLocations.description: Whether to include locations that are not marked on the in-game map.

commodityNames.description: A list of commodity names to include or exclude, depending on commodityNamesType. The list of valid commodity names can be retrieved from GET /api/commodity/items.

items.description: A list of commodity names to include or exclude, depending on commodityNamesType. The list of valid commodity names can be retrieved from GET /api/commodity/items.

commodityNamesType.description: Whether commodityNames is used as a whitelist (only include listed commodities) or blacklist (exclude listed commodities).

commodityTypes.description: A list of commodity types to include or exclude, depending on commodityTypesType. The list of valid commodity types can be retrieved from GET /api/commodity/item-types.

items.description: A list of commodity types to include or exclude, depending on commodityTypesType. The list of valid commodity types can be retrieved from GET /api/commodity/item-types.

commodityTypesType.description: Whether commodityTypes is used as a whitelist (only include listed commodity types) or blacklist (exclude listed commodity types).

maxVolume.description: DEPRECATED The maximum total volume in SCU for a single commodity unit. Must be between 1 and 100,000,000.

investment.description: The amount of aUEC to invest in the trade run. Must be between 1 and 100,000,000.

profitType.description: The profit optimisation strategy. Use 'time' to maximise profit per second (best overall efficiency), or 'pure' to maximise raw profit regardless of travel time.

ship.description: The ship used to trade. The list of valid ship names can be retrieved from GET /api/ships.

maxStops.description: The maximum number of trade stops (legs) in the route, between 1 and 5.

allowWaitTimes.description: Whether to allow routes that include stops where the player must wait for inventory to restock.

useAutoLoading.description: Whether to account for auto-loading time and cost when calculating profit.

smartFilters.description: Whether to enable smart filters that automatically exclude low-inventory listings likely to be out of stock.

minInventorySizeInScu.description: The minimum inventory size in SCU that a shop listing must have to be considered. Must be between 0 and 100,000,000.

origin.description: The optional full name of the starting shop to constrain the trade route search. When provided, only routes departing from this shop are returned. The list of valid shop names can be retrieved from GET /api/commodity/shops.

locationNames.description: A list of location names to include or exclude, depending on locationNamesType. The list of valid location names can be retrieved from GET /api/locations.

items.description: A list of location names to include or exclude, depending on locationNamesType. The list of valid location names can be retrieved from GET /api/locations.

origin.description: The full name of the starting shop for the itinerary. The list of valid shop names can be retrieved from GET /api/commodity/shops.

destination.description: The full name of the destination shop for the itinerary. The list of valid shop names can be retrieved from GET /api/commodity/shops.
destination.example: Stanton > Crusader > Yela > Grim HEX > Admin

allowableDetour.description: The maximum detour allowed as a percentage of the direct-route travel time, between 0 and 100. A value of 0 means no detour is allowed; 100 means intermediate stops may double the travel time.

investment.description: The amount of aUEC to invest in the trade run. Must be between 1 and 100,000,000.

profitType.description: The profit optimisation strategy. Use 'time' to maximise profit per second (best overall efficiency), or 'pure' to maximise raw profit regardless of travel time.

factionNames.description: A list of faction names to include or exclude, depending on factionsNamesType. The list of valid faction names can be retrieved from GET /api/factions.

items.description: A list of faction names to include or exclude, depending on factionsNamesType. The list of valid faction names can be retrieved from GET /api/factions.

factionsNamesType.description: Whether factionNames is used as a whitelist (only include locations belonging to listed factions) or blacklist (exclude locations belonging to listed factions).

minSecurityLevel.description: The minimum security level a location must have to be considered. The list of valid security levels can be retrieved from GET /api/security-levels.

supportedBoxSizeInScu.description: The maximum box size in SCU that the ship can load, between 1 and 32. Only shop listings compatible with this box size will be included. Valid values: 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 24, 32.

avoidHiddenLocations.description: Whether to include locations that are not marked on the in-game map.

commodityName.description: The name of the commodity to sell. The list of valid commodity names can be retrieved from GET /api/commodity/items.

commodityQuantityInScu.description: The quantity of the commodity in SCU. Used to calculate total profit estimates at each buyer. Must be between 1 and 100,000,000.

isCargoStolen.description: Whether the cargo being sold is stolen. Stolen cargo can only be sold at certain locations.

allowWaitTimes.description: Whether to include buyers where the player must wait for inventory to free up.

minInventorySizeInScu.description: The minimum available inventory size in SCU that a buyer must have to be considered. Must be between 0 and 100,000,000.

location.description: The full name of the location where the listing was observed. The list of valid location names can be retrieved from GET /api/locations.

transaction.description: Whether the shop buys or sells the commodity.

commodity.description: The name of the commodity. The list of valid commodity names can be retrieved from GET /api/commodity/items.

price.description: The observed price per SCU in aUEC. Must be between 1 and 100,000,000. Omit for a partial submission.

quantity.description: The observed available inventory in SCU. Must be between 0 and 100,000,000. Omit for a partial submission.

saturation.description: The observed inventory saturation as a ratio between 0 and 1, where 0 is empty and 1 is full. Omit for a partial submission.

boxSizesInScu.description: The box sizes in SCU supported by this shop listing. Valid values: 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 24, 32.

items.description: The box sizes in SCU supported by this shop listing. Valid values: 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 24, 32.

batchId.description: A SHA-256 hash that groups all listings submitted together in the same batch. All listings in a single submission should share the same batchId.

timestamp.description: The timestamp at which the listing was observed, in UTC.
